hero.title: About Me
hero.subtitle: Passionate about technology, innovation, and creating digital experiences that make a difference

myJourney.title: My Journey
paragraphs: I'm Mathiya, a passionate Gen Z software engineer who believes in the power of technology to transform ideas into reality. My journey began with curiosity about how digital worlds are created, and it has evolved into a deep commitment to crafting innovative solutions.

With expertise spanning web development, game creation, and creative coding, I thrive on challenges that push the boundaries of what's possible. Every project is an opportunity to learn, grow, and create something meaningful.

When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring the latest tech trends, gaming, or experimenting with new creative tools. I believe in continuous learning and staying ahead of the curve in this ever-evolving digital landscape.

events.title: Software Engineering Student
events.text: Currently pursuing my degree in Software Engineering, focusing on modern development practices, algorithms, and system design. Maintaining excellent academic performance while working on personal projects.

events.title: Freelance Developer
events.text: Started taking on freelance projects, building websites and applications for local businesses and startups. Gained valuable experience in client communication, project management, and real-world problem solving.

events.title: First Game Development Project
events.text: Completed my first major game development project using Unreal Engine. This project sparked my passion for interactive media and 3D graphics programming.

events.title: Started Programming Journey
events.text: Began learning programming with Python and JavaScript. Built my first web applications and discovered my passion for creating digital solutions.

education.title: Education
education.description: Comprehensive program covering software development, algorithms, data structures, system design, and modern programming practices.

items.title: Innovation
items.text: Push the boundaries of technology and create solutions that haven't been imagined yet.

items.title: Impact
items.text: Build technology that makes a positive difference in people's lives and communities.

items.title: Growth
items.text: Continuously learn and evolve with the rapidly changing technology landscape.

hero.title: My Projects
hero.subtitle: A showcase of innovative solutions, creative experiments, and digital experiences

items.title: E-Commerce Platform
items.shortDescription: Full-stack e-commerce solution with modern UI, secure payments, and admin dashboard.
items.longDescription: A comprehensive e-commerce platform built from the ground up, featuring a modern user interface, secure payment gateway integration, and a full-featured admin dashboard for managing products, orders, and customers.
features: Product catalog with search and filtering

items.title: Space Shooter Game
items.shortDescription: Immersive 3D space shooter built with Unreal Engine featuring dynamic gameplay.
items.longDescription: A thrilling 3D space shooter game developed in Unreal Engine. It features fast-paced combat, dynamic enemy AI, stunning visual effects, and a progressive difficulty system. This project was a deep dive into game physics, C++, and Blueprint scripting.

items.title: AI Chatbot Assistant
items.shortDescription: Intelligent chatbot powered by machine learning for customer support automation.
items.longDescription: A smart, conversational AI chatbot designed to automate customer support. It uses Natural Language Processing (NLP) to understand user queries and provide relevant answers. The model is built with TensorFlow and trained on a custom dataset.

items.title: Portfolio Website
items.shortDescription: Modern, responsive portfolio with advanced animations and interactive elements.
items.longDescription: The very website you are looking at. A personal portfolio designed to showcase my skills and projects, built with a focus on performance, aesthetics, and interactivity. It features a futuristic design with custom animations and a dynamic content engine.

items.title: Mobile App UI Design
items.shortDescription: Modern mobile app interface design with focus on user experience and accessibility.
items.longDescription: A complete UI/UX design for a modern mobile application, created in Figma. The project involved user research, wireframing, prototyping, and creating a full design system to ensure a consistent and intuitive user experience.

items.title: Data Visualization Dashboard
items.shortDescription: Interactive dashboard for data analysis with machine learning insights and predictions.
items.longDescription: An interactive data visualization dashboard built with D3.js and a Python backend. It allows users to upload datasets, explore the data through various charts and graphs, and gain insights from integrated machine learning models that provide predictions and trend analysis.

learning.title: Continuous Learning
learning.text: I'm constantly expanding my skill set and staying up-to-date with the latest technologies and industry trends. Currently exploring AI/ML, blockchain development, and advanced 3D graphics programming. My goal is to become a versatile developer capable of tackling any technical challenge.
